text:
Pika Pika... Chu Chu | The Gotta Catch 'Em All! Game Show
Trainers, did you see the fourth episode of our all-new live show, the Gotta Catch ’Em All! Game Show, hosted by @briandavidgilbert Episode 4 featuring   @JackiJing ,  @JaharaJaydeGames , and  @IfyNwadiwe   is now available on YouTube, be sure to check it out!

Follow us on Twitch and watch out for the next episode! https://www.twitch.tv/pokemon

#PokemonGameShow #GottaCatchEmAll #Pokemon

text:
How did I just lose EVERYTHING?! | The Gotta Catch 'Em All! Game Show - Episode 4
Trainers, the fourth episode of our all-new live show, the Gotta Catch ’Em All! Game Show, hosted by @briandavidgilbert is here! See @JackiJing,  @JaharaJaydeGames, and @IfyNwadiwe compete for the title of Gotta Catch ’Em All! Game Show champion! Who do you think will come out on top?

Follow us on Twitch and watch out for the next episode! https://www.twitch.tv/pokemon
